title: libwacom bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[2.14.0-3]
- Rearrange the button leaders for the Intuos Pro 3rd Gen (RHEL-101873)

[2.14.0-2]
- Add Wacom Intuos Pro 3rd Gen and newest Cintiqs (RHEL-101873)
full_text:
